meta.title: IntelliPharma — Graduation Project Invitation
meta.description: A smart platform integrating hybrid reinforcement learning with ERP & CRM systems.

hero.lead: You are warmly invited to attend the graduation project defense of
hero.subtitle: A smart platform integrating hybrid reinforcement learning with ERP & CRM systems.
hero.coverAlt: An aerial view at dusk of an intelligent pharmacy delivery network — glowing amber routes tracing between clustered hexagonal nodes across a darkened landscape.

event.title: Defense Details
event.locationValue: Faculty of Information Engineering, Damascus University

about.title: Intelligence, quietly at work
about.lead: Follow the story — from everyday AI to routes that think for pharmacies.

everyday.label: The shift
everyday.title: AI left the lab
everyday.body: Artificial intelligence slipped into ordinary life — suggesting the next song, translating a stranger's message, catching an illness before we feel it.

flow.label: The quiet role
flow.title: Keeping life moving
flow.body: Its quietest role may also be its most important: keeping the flow of goods that modern life depends on moving smoothly.

stakes.label: The stakes
stakes.title: Every minute matters
stakes.body: In logistics, every lost minute is a late delivery, every extra kilometer is fuel burned, every empty shelf is a patient without medicine.

engine.label: The engine
engine.title: Routes that think
engine.body: IntelliPharma applies reinforcement learning to plan pharmacy visit routes that adapt in real time to urgent orders, closed pharmacies, and shifting traffic — and the same engine extends to distribution, last-mile delivery, home services, and inspections.

team.title: The Team
team.lead: Four positions on the court. Watch the ball move — that is how the pieces of IntelliPharma talk to each other.
team.hint: Tap a position to meet the players and see their passes.
team.courtCaption: AI calls the play → Backend runs the floor → Dashboard & Mobile finish with a smart guide on each side.
team.emptyHint: Tap a jersey on the court to open that position.
team.supervision: The faculty of the Department of Software & Information Systems Engineering — Damascus University

passes.aiBackend: AI passes smarter decisions — routes and chat guidance — to the Backend engine.
passes.backendFrontend: Backend feeds the admin Dashboard with live data and its smart guide chatbot.
passes.backendFlutter: Backend feeds the Mobile app — and its chatbot that coaches new field staff.

ai.title: The thinking guide
ai.blurb: This position teaches the system to think — smarter visit routes when the day shifts, and the brains behind the smart guide chatbots on both Dashboard and Mobile. The play starts here.

backend.title: The engine room
backend.blurb: The hub of the floor. Stores data, answers requests, and keeps Dashboard, Mobile, and AI talking. Like a restaurant kitchen — you rarely see it, but nothing works without it.

frontend.title: The admin command center
frontend.blurb: The web Dashboard for admins — live operations at a glance, plus a smart guide chatbot that helps them decide and analyze the system in plain language — without leaning only on drawn charts.

flutter.title: The app in the field
flutter.blurb: The Mobile app for the road — with a smart guide chatbot that helps new employees (new distributors and sales representatives) learn the ropes and work with confidence.
